reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.8.5: stage 2 step 4. Raster documents can now be saved and opened as .batikpaint files (a ZIP of one PNG per layer plus a JSON manifest), with atomic writes so an existing file is never corrupted on a failed save. The paint window gains Open/Save and Export flattened PNG, which is the same full-document flatten the library will use.
